reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, it has everything you could need!! Nice, clean bathrooms!!

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Excelente servicio de cafetería. Aprovecho esta oportunidad para informar de la soberbia del control de gendarmeria  antes de chosmalal .como no quise bajarme de la ruta .estoy en  mi derecho.me pidieron hasta la boleta del super ..mientras pasaban el resto sin controlarlos hasta llegaron hablar a una central de datos .en el sosneado mdza también un gendarme con  olor pañales  también. nada personal con gendarmeria tuve la dicha de compartir como médico en la frontera de chubut con Chile.pero se ve que que a algunos las tiras en el pecho les pesa y desmerece un fuerza de gente de honor y valores

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. Excellent cafeteria service. I take this opportunity to report the arrogance of the Gendarmerie checkpoint before Chosmalal. Since I refused to get off the road—which is my right—they demanded everything, even my supermarket receipt, while everyone else passed through without being checked. They even went so far as to call a central database. In Sosneado, Mendoza, there was also a gendarme who smelled like diapers. Nothing personal against the Gendarmerie; I had the privilege of working as a doctor on the Chubut-Chile border. But it seems that for some, the badges on their chests are too heavy and diminish a force of honorable and principled people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNXJqbndBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención!! No siempre hay combustible. Bastante normal en otras estación también aún sin ser del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Great service! They don't always have fuel. That's pretty common at other stations too, even those not affiliated with ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXdXBtOGNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y rapidez en el despacho de combustibles.... En el shop buena atención y genial que esté un domingo hasta la tarde abierta la cocina , cuando no se encuentra nada abierto en chos malal para poder comer

(Translated by Google)
Good service and quick fuel pumps.... The shop is also good, and it's great that the kitchen is open until late on a Sunday afternoon, when there's nothing else open in Chos Malal to eat.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXdXVxNk1REAE

reviews.comment:
Domingo 14 hs una sola persona atendiendo, con el ritmo de siesta, autos esperando más de 15 minutos esperando, de pronto desaparece, los autos al lado del surtidor esperando…
Señores ACÁ no insistan en asociarnos si no dan el servicio mínimo.

(Translated by Google)
Sunday 2 PM, only one person working, at a naptime pace, cars waiting for more than 15 minutes, then suddenly disappearing, cars next to the pump waiting…
Gentlemen, do not insist on becoming a member if you cannot provide the minimum service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXaXRYdVdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Los despachantes de playa son genios. Se bancan todas. Lluvia frio nieve sol gente maleducada, insolente etc.
Gran contra, para cargar combustible hay fila de hasta 3 cuadras o más a veces.
Si está depaso trate de cargar de madrugada, evitará demoras.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants are amazing. They handle everything: rain, cold, snow, sun, rude, insolent people, etc. The big downside is that the lines to get gas can stretch for up to three blocks or more sometimes. If you're just passing through, try to fill up in the early morning; you'll avoid delays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXMzZ1aHlBRRAB
